textByHashes.d5f87462279168f0a5506600e83d87a16ec96408: Can't say as I've seen him... I'm sure if he's been to Al Kharid recently someone around here will have though.
textByHashes.bcedb203d67d3b6933b88e6de6e81db4ff9fd25c: I provide items to help you keep your legs!
textByHashes.715b03ef668ccae14a7f164af2cfb9080d02515d: This is just what I needed for my special secret... err... I've said too much! Take this and get out of here quickly!
textByHashes.14989ff04b906e97f5a16f9c2b943a00e77410ba: So I see! Unfortunately it seems to have expired yesterday! Nevermind.
textByHashes.2eec85416985c50947bdf3a9c22169c048847410: I'm sorry, there's nothing I can do.
